# coolify_services (Data Source)

Use this data source to list all Coolify services.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "coolify_services" "all" {}

output "service_names" {
  value = [for s in data.coolify_services.all.services : s.name]
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `services` (Attributes List) The list of services. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--services))

<a id="nestedatt--services"></a>
### Nested Schema for `services`

Read-Only:

- `description` (String) A description of the service.
- `name` (String) The name of the service.
- `type` (String) The type of the service.
- `uuid` (String) The unique identifier of the service.
